category_sources: source_facts.description says "Image processing library"; official ExactCODE page https://exactcode.com/opensource/exactimage/ describes ExactImage as a fast, modern, generic image processing library.
display_name_sources: Official project page https://exactcode.com/opensource/exactimage/ uses the project name ExactImage; source_facts.homepage points to that official page.
docs_sources: Official ExactCODE project page https://exactcode.com/opensource/exactimage/ is the best official documentation surface and includes usage notes for econvert, edisplay, edentify, hocr2pdf, API notes, releases, and compile instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ExactCODE page https://exactcode.com/opensource/exactimage/ says the latest source is available from the SVN repository at svn.exactcode.de/exact-image/trunk; official SVN page https://svn.exactcode.de/ documents master checkout URLs using http://svn.exactcode.de/$project/trunk.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an image processing library; official ExactCODE page https://exactcode.com/opensource/exactimage/ describes a C++ library plus command-line frontends such as econvert, edentify, bardecode, and hocr2pdf.
